# Example Profile: Vite Weekly

- profile_name: vite-weekly
- repository: https://github.com/vitejs/vite.git
- branch: main
- period_days: 7
- output_path: vite-weekly-newsletter.md
- title_style: Vite Builder Weekly

Editorial focus:
- Prioritize dev-server behavior, plugin API changes, SSR, HMR reliability, package ecosystem compatibility, and build performance.
- De-emphasize purely internal cleanup unless plugin authors or framework adapters need to respond.
- Deep-dive candidates: plugin API adjustments, major dependency upgrades, SSR behavior changes, and migration guidance.

Section preferences:
- Keep sections in this order: Build and Serve, Plugin Author Impact, Framework Integration, Performance, Fixes and Follow-ups.
- Add a quick "Upgrade watchlist" bullet list when changes could affect larger monorepos.

Tone and format:
- Audience: frontend infrastructure teams, library authors, and framework maintainers.
- Keep it punchy, practical, and specific about what to verify locally.
